song_name: I Can Love You Like That
version_description: Specific, corrected chords with capo which will transpose to correct key, relabeled and fully timed sections, corrected lyrics, appropriate strum pattern.

versions.song_name: I Can Love You Like That
I Can Love You Like That
versions.version_description: Full chord tab of song. Note the key modulation in final chorus from E to F, though its a simple 1 fret move.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Sittin On The Dock Of The Bay

content:
Capo 3 for the original key; includes the half-step-up modulation
